inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

outputs.name: closed
outputs.description: Flags whether the WebSocket session is closed. A value of : true indicates that the WebSocket session was closed successfully. false indicates that the WebSocket session was not closed successfully.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

outputs.name: disconnected
outputs.description: Flags whether the WebSocket connection is disconnected. A value of : true indicates that the WebSocket session was disconnected successfully. false indicates that the WebSocket session was not disconnected successfully.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the cookies information.

outputs.name: cookies
outputs.description: Conditional. List of the cookies that are part of the HTTP request to establish a WebSocket connection. This parameter returns value only if cookies were part of the request.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the extension information.

outputs.name: extensions
outputs.description: Conditional. The list of extensions for a WebSocket connection.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the header information.

outputs.name: headers
outputs.description: Conditional. The list of the headers included in with the request to establish a WebSocket connection. This parameter returns a value only if headers were part of the request.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the path parameters information.

outputs.name: queryParameters
outputs.description: Conditional. The path parameters included in with the request for establishing a WebSocket connection.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the path parameter information.

inputs.name: pathParameterName
inputs.description: The path parameter name of the query parameter for which you want to obtain a value.

outputs.name: pathParameterValue
outputs.description: Conditional. The value for the provided parameter name. This parameter is returned only if a path parameter of the specified value was part of the request.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve HTTP request information.

outputs.name: requestURI
outputs.description: The Uniform Resource Identifier used by the client to identify the request.

outputs.name: queryString
outputs.description: One or more name/value pairs included as part of the query strings in request uniform resource locator(URL) which assigns values to specified parameters. For example, ?name=ferret&color=purple .

outputs.name: host
outputs.description: Name or IP address of the WebSocket server that received the upgrade request.

outputs.name: httpVersion
outputs.description: The HTTP version used in the request.

outputs.name: method
outputs.description: The HTTP method used for establishing WebSocket connection.

outputs.name: origin
outputs.description: The value of the origin request header.

outputs.name: userPrincipal
outputs.description: The name of the authenticated user used in the request.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to obtain query parameters.

outputs.name: queryParameters
outputs.description: Conditional. The list of query parameters used on the URL that established a WebSocket connection.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to obtain query parameters.

inputs.name: queryParameterName
inputs.description: The name of the query parameter for which you want to obtain a value.

outputs.name: queryParameterValue
outputs.description: Conditional. The value for the provided parameter name. The parameter is only returned if there is a query parameter of that name in the URL.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the subprotocols of the connection.

outputs.name: subProtocols
outputs.description: The WebSocket protocols used as part of establishing a WebSocket connection.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

inputs.name: payload
inputs.description: Byte array that contains the payload.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: The offset from the byte array till which the data is to be read.

inputs.name: length
inputs.description: The maximum number of byte array to read from the payload.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

inputs.name: statusCode
inputs.description: Indicates the reason why the underlying WebSocket connection was closed. The pre-defined status codes when closing an established connection are defined in Section https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6455#section-7.4 .

inputs.name: reason
inputs.description: Text explaining the reason for closure.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

inputs.name: cause
inputs.description: Text explaining the cause of the error.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: The content of the message.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Required. Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to send the ping message.

inputs.name: applicationData
inputs.description: Optional. The application data to be sent as part of the ping message. If the parameter value is null an empty buffer will be sent.

inputs.name: charset
inputs.description: Optional. The character encoding. If the parameter value is null, the default character set is used.

outputs.name: pinged
outputs.description: Indicates the success or failure of the ping message. This parameter returns a value of true if the ping message is received successfully. Else the parameter returns the value false.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to send the pong message.

inputs.name: applicationData
inputs.description: Optional. The application data to be sent as part of the pong message. If the parameter value is null an empty buffer will be sent.

inputs.name: charset
inputs.description: Optional. The character encoding. If the parameter value is null, the default character set is used.

outputs.name: ponged
outputs.description: Conditional. Indicates the success or failure of the pong message. This parameter returns a value of true if the pong message is received successfully. Else the parameter returns the value of false.

inputs.name: sessionId
inputs.description: Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: Sends messages containing the payload to the destination. The message could be a byte array or a text message.

outputs.name: sent
outputs.description: Flags indicating the result of the send operation. A value of : true indicates that the WebSocket session was sent successfully. false indicates that the WebSocket session was not sent successfully.
